englishDefinitions: One of a family of dishes originating from Indian cuisine, flavored by a spiced sauce.
A spiced sauce or relish, especially one flavored with curry powder.
(incel slang, derogatory, ethnic slur) A person of South Asian heritage.
examples: […] while another tells us that white women “are also THE most racist group of foids. they would rather put a bullet through their brain than date a curry or sandcel.”
For example, spicycurry says, “STOP THE COPE NOW. The only ones who should be complaining about race are us curries who are literally at the bottom of the pile.”
People get mixed up by thinking race is #1 because girls aren't going for asians and curries.
